sources.full: Mundo de Kÿr — Bestiário dos NPCs de Lumenkar v1.3 — correção de magias finais

monster.name: Tarth, Rei Usurpador do Dia Inapagável

trait.name: Fragmento Primordial da Luz
entries: Bright Light fills a 60-foot Emanation originating from Tarth, and Dim Light extends 60 feet beyond it. Invisible creatures and objects in the Bright Light are visible to Tarth. A hostile creature that starts its turn in the Bright Light can’t benefit from the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition against Tarth until the start of its next turn.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (5/Day)
entries: If Tarth fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Tarth has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Sovereign Exposure
entries: When a hostile creature within 60 feet of Tarth fails a saving throw against one of his effects, it sheds Bright Light in a 10-foot radius until the end of its next turn. Attack rolls against that creature have Advantage if the attacker can see it.

trait.name: Siege Sovereign
entries: Tarth deals double damage to objects and structures.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Tarth makes three Solar Edict Blade attacks. He can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Solar Edict Blade
entries: Melee Attack Roll: +17, reach 10 ft. Hit: 21 ({@damage 2d10 + 10}) Slashing damage plus 22 ({@damage 4d10}) Radiant damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a {@dc 25} Wisdom saving throw or have the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Decree of Revealing Light (Recharge 5–6)
entries: Charisma Saving Throw: {@dc 25}, each hostile creature in a 90-foot Cone. Failure: 91 ({@damage 14d12}) Radiant damage, and the target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn. Success: Half damage only. Failure or Success: magical Darkness in the area ends if it was created by a spell or effect of level 8 or lower.

bonus.name: Inescapable Judgment (Recharge 4–6)
entries: Tarth chooses one creature he can see within 120 feet. Until the start of Tarth’s next turn, the target can’t take the Hide action, can’t benefit from the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition, and can’t teleport unless it succeeds on a {@dc 25} Charisma saving throw.

reaction.name: Radiant Reversal
entries: Trigger: Tarth is hit by an attack roll made by a creature he can see within 60 feet. Response: Tarth adds 5 to his AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss. If the attack misses, the attacker takes 22 ({@damage 4d10}) Radiant damage.

legendary.name: Commanding Light
entries: Tarth uses Spellcasting to cast Command or Fogo do Julgamento.

legendary.name: Solar Step
entries: Tarth moves up to half his Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks. During this movement, he can move through hostile creatures’ spaces, but can’t end there.

legendary.name: Blade of Precedent (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Tarth makes one Solar Edict Blade attack.

legendary.name: Overrule Darkness (Costs 3 Actions)
entries: Tarth ends one magical Darkness, Illusion, or invisibility effect he can see within 120 feet, if the effect was created by a spell or effect of level 8 or lower.

mythic.name: Sol Usurpado
entries: When Tarth is reduced to 0 Hit Points, he doesn’t die or fall {@condition Unconscious|XPHB}. Instead, he regains 260 Hit Points, all conditions on him end, and the Fragment erupts. For 1 minute, his Fragmento Primordial da Luz Emanation increases to 120 feet, and his Solar Edict Blade deals an extra 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Radiant damage.
Use Tarth as a final boss or war-ending antagonist. He is calibrated above the Ancient Red Dragon/Colossus band, but below the Tarrasque as a pure physical catastrophe.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Tarth casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 25}, +17 to hit with spell attacks).

trait.name: Fragmento Primordial das Trevas
entries: Sagremor is surrounded by a 60-foot Emanation of Dim Light. Nonmagical Bright Light in the Emanation becomes Dim Light, and magical Bright Light created by a spell or effect of level 8 or lower becomes Dim Light while in the Emanation.

trait.name: Greater Shadow Resistance
entries: Sagremor has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects. Spell attack rolls against him have Disadvantage while he is in Dim Light or Darkness.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
entries: If Sagremor fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Unrecorded Passage
entries: Sagremor doesn’t provoke Opportunity Attacks while in Dim Light or Darkness.

trait.name: No Witness Remains
entries: A creature reduced to 0 Hit Points by Sagremor can’t speak, cast spells with Verbal components, or communicate telepathically until it regains Hit Points.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Sagremor makes three Horizonless Blade attacks. He can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Horizonless Blade
entries: Melee Attack Roll: +16, reach 10 ft. Hit: 18 ({@damage 2d10 + 7}) Slashing damage plus 27 ({@damage 6d8}) Necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a {@dc 24} Charisma saving throw or be unable to benefit from Advantage until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Night Without Witnesses (Recharge 5–6)
entries: Charisma Saving Throw: {@dc 24}, each hostile creature in a 60-foot Emanation originating from Sagremor. Failure: 72 ({@damage 16d8}) Necrotic damage, and the target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition and can’t take Reactions until the end of its next turn. Success: Half damage only.

bonus.name: Cut the Line of Sight
entries: Sagremor teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space he can see that is in Dim Light or Darkness. Until the start of his next turn, he has Advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

reaction.name: Black Interval
entries: Trigger: Sagremor takes damage. Response: Sagremor halves the damage, and the attacker must succeed on a {@dc 24} Wisdom saving throw or have the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn.

legendary.name: Silent Step
entries: Sagremor moves up to half his Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

legendary.name: Umbral Casting
entries: Sagremor uses Spellcasting to cast Arranhão de Ausência, Minor Illusion, or Manto das Sombras.

legendary.name: Horizon Cut (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Sagremor makes one Horizonless Blade attack.

legendary.name: Erase Feature (Costs 3 Actions)
entries: Charisma Saving Throw: {@dc 24}, one creature Sagremor can see within 60 feet. Failure: the target can’t use Reactions, Legendary Actions, or one Recharge action of Sagremor’s choice until the end of its next turn. Success: no effect.

mythic.name: O Escuro Anterior
entries: When Sagremor is reduced to 0 Hit Points, he becomes a Large shadow for 1 minute instead of dying. He regains 220 Hit Points, gains a fly Speed of 90 feet (hover), and can move through creatures and objects as Difficult Terrain. He takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Force damage if he ends his turn inside an object.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Sagremor casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 24}, +16 to hit with spell attacks).

monster.name: Clarisse Galvino, Vetor do Céu Solto
resist: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks

trait.name: Fragmento Primordial do Vento
entries: Ranged attack rolls against Clarisse have Disadvantage if she moved at least 20 feet since the end of her last turn. Nonmagical smoke, fog, and gas in a 60-foot Emanation originating from her are dispersed at the end of each of her turns.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If Clarisse fails a saving throw, she can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Clarisse has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Unheld Body
entries: Clarisse can move through the space of any creature, and this movement doesn’t provoke Opportunity Attacks from creatures she has damaged this turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Clarisse makes three Pressure Cut attacks. She can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Pressure Cut
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +16, reach 10 ft. or range 150 ft. Hit: 18 ({@damage 2d8 + 9}) Slashing damage plus 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Thunder damage, and if the target is Large or smaller, Clarisse pushes it up to 20 feet straight away from herself.

action.name: Rupturing Gale (Recharge 5–6)
entries: Strength Saving Throw: {@dc 22}, each creature in a 120-foot Cone. Failure: 66 ({@damage 12d10}) Thunder damage, and the target is pushed up to 60 feet straight away from Clarisse and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. Success: Half damage only.

bonus.name: Slipstream
entries: Clarisse moves up to half her Speed. One willing creature she passes within 5 feet of can move up to 15 feet without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

reaction.name: Deflect Momentum
entries: Trigger: Clarisse is hit by an attack roll. Response: Clarisse adds 5 to her AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss. If the attack misses, Clarisse can move up to 20 feet without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

legendary.name: Drift
entries: Clarisse moves up to half her Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

legendary.name: Pressure Cut
entries: Clarisse makes one Pressure Cut attack.

legendary.name: Scatter Formation (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Strength Saving Throw: {@dc 22}, each creature of Clarisse’s choice within 30 feet. Failure: the target is pushed up to 30 feet and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. Success: the target is pushed up to 10 feet.

legendary.name: Break Concentration (Costs 3 Actions)
entries: Each hostile creature concentrating on a spell within 60 feet must make a {@dc 22} Constitution saving throw. Failure: the target loses Concentration.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Clarisse casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 22}, +14 to hit with spell attacks).

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The NPC has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Custodian of Records
entries: The NPC has Advantage on Intelligence checks made to identify, authenticate, alter, or detect forged documents.

items.name: Archive Lock
items.entry: Initiative count 20. One door, chest, book, or written record in the domain becomes magically locked until initiative count 20 on the next round. Opening it requires a {@dc 18} Dexterity check using Thieves’ Tools or a {@dc 18} Intelligence (Arcana) check.

items.name: Legal Contradiction
items.entry: Initiative count 20. One creature in the domain that is concentrating on a spell must make a {@dc 18} Intelligence saving throw. Failure: the creature loses Concentration.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The NPC makes two Sealbrand Dagger attacks and uses Binding Clause if available.

action.name: Sealbrand Dagger
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +10, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. Hit: 7 ({@damage 1d4 + 5}) Piercing damage plus 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Binding Clause (Recharge 5–6)
entries: Intelligence Saving Throw: {@dc 18}, one creature the NPC can see within 60 feet. Failure: 36 ({@damage 8d8}) Psychic damage, and the target can’t take Reactions until the end of its next turn. Success: Half damage only.

reaction.name: Procedural Objection
entries: Trigger: A creature the NPC can see within 60 feet makes an attack roll or ability check. Response: the creature must subtract 1d6 from the roll.

action.name: Radiant Mace
entries: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 ({@damage 1d8 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage plus 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Radiant damage.

bonus.name: Liturgical Shelter (Recharge 4–6)
entries: The NPC chooses one creature it can see within 60 feet. The target regains 22 ({@dice 4d10}) Hit Points and ends the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition on itself.

spellcasting.name: Kÿr Spellcasting
headerEntries: The NPC casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}, +9 to hit with spell attacks).

trait.name: Evasion
entries: If the NPC is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the NPC instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save and only half damage if it fails. It can’t use this trait if it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Sneak Attack (1/Turn)
entries: The NPC deals an extra 21 (6d6) damage when it hits a target with a weapon attack and has Advantage on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 feet of an ally of the NPC that doesn’t have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition and the NPC doesn’t have Disadvantage on the attack roll.

items.name: Legal Contradiction

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The NPC makes three Rapier or Dagger attacks.

action.name: Rapier
entries: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 ({@damage 1d8 + 6}) Piercing damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Poison damage.

action.name: Dagger
entries: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +9, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. Hit: 8 ({@damage 1d4 + 6}) Piercing damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Poison damage.

bonus.name: Cunning Action
entries: The NPC takes the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

reaction.name: Defensive Stance
entries: Trigger: The NPC is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. Response: The NPC adds 4 to its AC against melee attack rolls, including the triggering attack, until the start of its next turn, possibly causing the attack to miss.

trait.name: Siege Artisan
entries: The NPC deals double damage to objects and structures.

trait.name: Forged Discipline

items.name: Living Iron

items.name: Reinforced Structure
items.entry: Initiative count 20. One allied creature in the domain gains 20 Temporary Hit Points until initiative count 20 on the next round.

action.name: Forgehammer

action.name: Rizomatic Reinforcement (Recharge 5–6)

bonus.name: Tempered Guard
entries: The NPC chooses one creature it can see within 30 feet. The target gains Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage until the start of the NPC’s next turn.

trait.name: Toxic Familiarity
entries: The NPC has Advantage on saving throws against Poison and the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The NPC makes two Thorn Sickle attacks and uses Spores of Compliance if available.

action.name: Thorn Sickle
entries: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) Slashing damage plus 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Poison damage.

action.name: Spores of Compliance (Recharge 5–6)
entries: Constitution Saving Throw: {@dc 16}, each hostile creature in a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point the NPC can see within 90 feet. Failure: 35 ({@damage 10d6}) Poison damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn. Success: Half damage only.

bonus.name: Medicinal Draught (3/Day)
entries: One creature within 5 feet regains 18 ({@dice 4d8}) Hit Points and ends the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition on itself.

bonus.name: V
entries: Checklist de consistência mecânica
Nenhuma habilidade usa efeito indefinido ou consequência narrativa sem regra.
Todos os ataques usam Melee Attack Roll, Ranged Attack Roll ou Melee or Ranged Attack Roll, com Hit definido.
Todos os efeitos resistidos usam Saving Throw, DC, Failure e Success quando aplicável.
Todas as durações indicam start/end of turn, 1 minute, Recharge, X/Day ou outro marco claro.
Spellcasting aparece como Action quando usado em combate, seguindo a apresentação moderna de monstros.
Conjuradores relevantes usam magias originais de Kÿr em Kÿr Spellcasting.
Personagens de jogador não constam como criaturas, NPCs ou entradas de apêndice.

spellcasting.name: Kÿr Spellcasting
headerEntries: The NPC casts one of the following spells using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}, +8 to hit with spell attacks).
